---
title: "Talks & Service"
listing:
  id: talks
  contents: data/talks.yml
  template: templates/talks.ejs
  sort: "year desc"
---

<span class="eyebrow">Presentations & invited talks</span>

## Talks

::: {#talks}
:::

## Academic service

- **Co-convenor**, EGOS sub-theme *"Corporate Governance for 'Humanity': Seeking Humble and Contextualized Leadership"* (2025)
- **Ad-hoc reviewer**: Strategic Management Society (2022–present); International Corporate Governance Society (2020–present); Academy of Management annual conference, OMT & STR divisions (2019–present)

## Community

- Organizing committee, **Junior Academics in Strategy, Entrepreneurship and Innovation in the Netherlands (JASEIN)** (2023–2026)
- Member, **Tilburg Young Academy**, Tilburg University (2023–present)

## Grants & awards

- **NWO Small Compute Applications grant** (2025) — access to the Dutch national supercomputer Snellius for large-scale big-data research
- **Starter grant**, Tilburg University (2023) — funding a PhD position advancing a new line of research
- **Best paper nomination**, AOM STR division (2021)
- **Google Cloud Platform Research Credits** (2019, 2020, with Prof. dr. Stephan Hollander)
- **NWO Computing Time on National Computer Facilities** (2019, with Prof. dr. Stephan Hollander)
